title: True Ore Borders
description: This pack adds outlines to all ores using their natural colors, making them easier to spot while keeping a true vanilla style. Perfect for players who want better visibility without breaking immersion.
body:
# 🪨 Enhanced Ore Borders (Minecraft Texture Pack) Elevate your Minecraft mining experience with **Enhanced Ore Borders** - a subtle yet effective texture pack that adds **natural-colored outlines** around all ore blocks. These refined borders make ores stand out clearly against stone, boosting visibility **without compromising the classic vanilla aesthetic**. ## 🎨 Textures Changed ### Overworld Ores - ⚫ **Coal Ore** (outlined) - ⚙️ **Iron Ore** (outlined) - 🟠 **Copper Ore** (outlined) - 🟨 **Gold Ore** (outlined) - 🔴 **Redstone Ore** (outlined) - 🟩 **Emerald Ore** (outlined) - 🔵 **Lapis Lazuli Ore** (outlined) - 💎 **Diamond Ore** (outlined)

--- ### Nether Ores - ⚪ **Nether Quartz Ore** (outlined) - 🟤 **Ancient Debris** (outlined) - 🟡 **Nether Gold Ore** (outlined) - ✨ **Gilded Blackstone** (outlined)

--- **Ideal for players seeking a minimalist way to enhance ore visibility while preserving Minecraft’s original look and feel.**
